turns.assistantContent:
**Dispatching Wave 1: 3 parallel hivexplorer agents for comprehensive 15-skill quality audit.**

Each agent receives the 9-phase quality standards, progressive disclosure rules, and conflict detection criteria. They will read SKILL.md + all references + templates + tests + scripts for assigned skills and produce structured evidence bundles.
